summary: Iteration 66 - Bug Fix Verification: All tests PASSED. Verified fixes for 3 reported bugs: (1) 'language' column error in publish endpoint - FIXED, (2) Image regeneration now uses Portuguese language templates - VERIFIED, (3) Campaign 'Amigas na luta' shows Portuguese content correctly. Video generation via Sora 2 API is DOWN (500 error) - external service issue, not a code bug.

minor.issue: 500 Server Error when generating videos - external service issue, not a code bug

issues: Minor React hydration warning: button cannot be a descendant of button - cosmetic, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Amigas na luta' campaign (ID: 068141ee-0f89-40ae-8a27-617c1d5db4ae)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified. The 'Amigas na luta' campaign has campaign_language: 'pt' and shows Portuguese content correctly. The regenerate-single-image endpoint correctly uses language='pt' when specified. The publish endpoint no longer has the 'language' column error. Sora 2 video API is returning 500 errors - this is an external service issue.

frontend.Marketing Page: PASSED - Shows 45 campaigns including 'Amigas na luta'
frontend.Content Tab: PASSED - Shows WhatsApp preview with Portuguese text
frontend.WhatsApp Preview: PASSED - Shows 'Força & Fé: Sua Dose Diária de Inspiração!' (Portuguese)
frontend.Results Tab: PASSED - Shows performance metrics by channel
frontend.Channel Selector: PASSED - All 8 channels available (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Google Ads, Telegram, Email, SMS)

bug_1_language_column_error.description: Removed 'language' field from campaigns INSERT (Supabase table doesn't have this column)
bug_1_language_column_error.verification: Publish endpoint now works without error

bug_2_image_regeneration_language.description: Improved image regeneration prompts to use language-specific templates
bug_2_image_regeneration_language.verification: regenerate-single-image endpoint accepts and uses language='pt' parameter

bug_3_i18n_key_fix.description: Fixed i18n key in FinalPreview.jsx from 'studio.video_generating' to 'studio.generating_video'

bug_4_sora_video_generation.description: Sora 2 API is returning 500 Server Error
bug_4_sora_video_generation.verification: Not a code bug - external API service is down

campaign_data.content_language_verified: Portuguese (Força & Fé: Sua Dose Diária de Inspiração!)
